name: recost-api-analyzer
description: Scan your codebase for API call patterns, estimate costs, and get optimization suggestions.

commands.title: ReCost: Generate Context for Coding Agent

recost.scanGlob.description: Glob pattern for files to scan

recost.scanIncludeGlobs.description: Optional comma-separated allowlist globs. When set, only matching files are scanned (example: packages/**/src/**,packages/**/test/**,prod-server-integration-tests/**).

recost.excludeGlob.description: Glob pattern for files to exclude from scanning

recost.aiReview.minConfidence.description: Minimum confidence for AI findings to be accepted.

recost.aiReview.maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files to include in AI review context.

recost.aiReview.maxCharsPerFile.description: Maximum characters per file excerpt sent to AI review.

recost.aiReview.model.description: OpenAI model used for AI review.

recost.pricingSyncIntervalHours.description: How often (in hours) to re-sync pricing from the ReCost backend. Set to a higher value to reduce network requests.

scripts.build: npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:webview && npm run build:ext
scripts.build:dashboard: cd dashboard && npm run build && rm -rf ../dashboard-dist && cp -r dist ../dashboard-dist
scripts.test:scanner: tsc -p tsconfig.scanner-tests.json && node dist-test/test/scanner-patterns.test.js && node dist-test/test/workspace-scanner.test.js && node dist-test/test/workspace-file-access.test.js && node dist-test/test/endpoint-classification.test.js && node dist-test/test/local-waste-detector.test.js && node dist-test/test/chat-providers.test.js && node dist-test/test/fingerprint-registry.test.js && node dist-test/test/pricing-sync.test.js && node dist-test/test/ast-parser-loader.test.js && node dist-test/test/ast-call-visitor.test.js && node dist-test/test/ast-import-resolver.test.js && node dist-test/test/ast-scanner.test.js && node dist-test/test/ast-python.test.js && node dist-test/test/ast-frequency-analyzer.test.js && node dist-test/test/ast-cache-detector.test.js && node dist-test/test/ast-batch-detector.test.js && node dist-test/test/ast-concurrency-detector.test.js && node dist-test/test/ast-cross-file-resolver.test.js && node dist-test/intelligence/__tests__/builder.test.js && node dist-test/intelligence/__tests__/clusters.test.js && node dist-test/intelligence/__tests__/compression.test.js && node dist-test/intelligence/__tests__/export.test.js
